description: Functions that exist in multiple files but are INTENTIONALLY not kept in sync. check-propagation.js reads this file and filters out matching misses. Use sparingly — the default assumption is that same-named functions in multiple files are copies that should propagate together.

entries.reason: Local helper in settings-guardian.js that appends to a settings-audit log. Completely independent from scripts/append-hook-warning.js which manages the global hook-warnings.json cache. Same name, different surface, different contract. Confirmed unrelated in PR #507 R1.

alerts skill has its own inline learning-effectiveness calculator that's been intentionally kept in-skill to avoid coupling the alerts runtime to scripts/health/. Different signature and scope from scripts/health/checkers/learning-effectiveness.js. Confirmed unrelated in PR #507 R1.

Lives only in the canonical scripts/lib/safe-fs.js. Skill-copy safe-fs.js files (.claude/skills/*/scripts/lib/safe-fs.js) DO NOT carry this function — C2d trim in PR #507 R1 intentionally removed DEBT_DIR writers from skill copies since skills must never write to docs/technical-debt/ from their own libs. Used only by writeMasterDebtSync/appendMasterDebtSync which are canonical-only.
Same as atomicWriteViaTmp — canonical-only helper for DEBT directory management. Skill copies intentionally dropped this in PR #507 R1 C2d.
Same as atomicWriteViaTmp — canonical-only snapshot helper for the DEBT writer rollback path. Skill copies dropped this in PR #507 R1 C2d because they never call it.
Canonical-only rollback helper used exclusively by appendMasterDebtSync. Skill copies dropped this in PR #507 R1 C2d alongside the DEBT writers.

Canonical-only MASTER_DEBT writer. Skill copies dropped this in PR #507 R1 C2d because skills must not write to docs/technical-debt/ from their own libs — TDMS writes always route through scripts/debt/intake-manual.js per MEMORY.md.
Same as writeMasterDebtSync — canonical-only DEBT writer. Skill copies dropped this in PR #507 R1 C2d.

In PR #507 R2 C2d I added a top-level `function errCode(err)` helper in scripts/lib/safe-fs.js (propagated to all 8 skill copies) for defensive .code extraction. The 4 files listed here have BLOCK-LOCAL `const errCode = ...` inline within catch blocks (e.g., `const errCode = err && typeof err === 'object' && 'code' in err ? String(err.code) : ''`). They are independent locals, NOT copies of the safe-fs helper. Follow-up candidate: consolidate the 4 locals into the shared safe-fs helper, but scope out of PR #507.

Two independent one-liner helpers around `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` with different signatures — post-todos-render.js accepts an optional cwd (execFileSync), check-triggers.js takes no arg (spawnSync). Cost of extracting to a shared lib exceeds benefit for 2 call sites with different APIs. Future consolidation candidate if a 3rd copy appears. Confirmed independent in PR #511 R1.
